name: Suspicious Execution via IE per User Utility
description: Detects the execution of ie4uinit.exe (Internet Explorer per-user initialization) from unusual directories. While a legitimate component, adversaries may replace this file with malware to achieve code execution under a trusted name. This rule identifies executions outside the standard system directories.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'ie4uinit.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the ie4uinit.exe executable, expected to be from an unusual directory.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute ie4uinit.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
